title: The HNWI Charter Surge of 2024: What the Wealth Report Got Right (and Wrong)
meta_description: A 2024 retrospective on the luxury rental boom in jets, villas, and yachts. What drove it, who benefited, and what it means for the market going forward.
author: Marcus Reid

title: The 2022 Superyacht Boom That Reshaped Luxury Rentals Forever
meta_description: How the 2022 superyacht charter surge rewrote pricing, availability, and client expectations across luxury rentals. A firsthand look at what really happened.
author: Jordan Cole

title: How the EU's 2019 Superyacht VAT Crackdown Changed Luxury Rentals Forever
meta_description: The EU's 2019 superyacht VAT enforcement shook luxury rentals across yachts, jets, and villas. Here's what it meant and why it still matters.
author: Sophie Chen
